sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76309" key="o)yigame/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀψῐγᾰμ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n76309.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">marry late</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:119:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">119.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
